Class Resources

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AnahataToolkit
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.Resources
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class Resources extends AnahataToolkit
The definitive V2 URI-centric toolkit for managed multimodal resources.

This toolkit provides a unified interface for RAG-based context augmentation and persistent, surgical mutations of text-based resources. It abstracts the complexities of different storage protocols (File, URL, String) while enforcing optimistic locking and context integrity.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • Resources

      public Resources()

  • Method Details

    • getSystemInstructions

      public List<String> getSystemInstructions() throws Exception
      Gets a list of system instruction strings provided by this context provider. These are typically prepended to the conversation as high-level guidance.

      Injects critical surgical precision rules into the model's system prompt, ensuring environmental awareness during file mutations.

      Returns:
      A list of system instruction strings.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during instruction generation.

    • getActor

      private String getActor()
      Intelligently resolves the actor string for registration heritage.

      Technical Purity: Inspects the current tool execution context to identify the model and tool responsible for the registration.

      Returns:
      The actor description string.

    • loadResources

      public List<String> loadResources(List<String> uriStrings, TextViewportSettings initialSettings) throws Exception
      Loads multiple resources into the agi context in a single turn.
      Parameters:
      uriStrings - The URIs to load.
      initialSettings - Optional initial viewport configuration.
      Returns:
      The list of unique resource identifiers.
      Throws:
      Exception - if loading fails.

    • updateViewport

      public void updateViewport(String resourceId, TextViewportSettings settings) throws Exception
      Updates the viewport configuration for an existing text resource.
      Parameters:
      resourceId - The UUID of the resource.
      settings - The new settings.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the resource is not found.

    • unloadResources

      public void unloadResources(List<String> resourceIds)
      Unloads multiple resources from the context.
      Parameters:
      resourceIds - The UUIDs to unregister.

    • unloadResourcesByUri

      public void unloadResourcesByUri(List<String> uris) throws Exception
      Unloads resources by their URIs.
      Parameters:
      uris - The list of URIs to unload.
      Throws:
      Exception - if a URI matches multiple resources.

    • setProviding

      public void setProviding(List<String> resourceIds, boolean providing)
      Sets the 'providing' flag of various resources by their UUID.
      Parameters:
      resourceIds - The list of resource UUIDs.
      providing - True to enable, false to disable.

    • createTextFile

      public String createTextFile(FullTextFileCreate create) throws Exception
      Creates a new text file on the host filesystem and automatically registers it as a resource.
      Parameters:
      create - The creation DTO.
      Returns:
      The new resource UUID.
      Throws:
      Exception - if creation fails.

    • updateTextResource

      public String updateTextResource(FullTextResourceUpdate update) throws Exception
      Updates an existing text file using full content replacement.
      Parameters:
      update - The update DTO.
      Returns:
      A standard unified diff of the changes applied.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the update fails.

    • findAndReplaceInTextResource

      public String findAndReplaceInTextResource(TextResourceReplacements replacements) throws Exception
      Performs surgical text replacements in an existing file.
      Parameters:
      replacements - The replacements DTO.
      Returns:
      A standard unified diff of the changes applied.
      Throws:
      Exception - if replacements fail.

    • editTextResource

      public String editTextResource(TextResourceLineEdits edits) throws Exception
      Performs a set of semantic line edits (insertions, replacements, deletions) in an existing file.

      This is the next-generation surgical editor that targets absolute coordinates from the RAG message without requiring mental arithmetic.

      Parameters:
      edits - The semantic line edits DTO.
      Returns:
      A standard unified diff of the changes applied.
      Throws:
      Exception - if application fails.
